ab: api, yau isu ta leppawan?
en: api, are you home?

ab: yau, tuqaz ka!
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: api, yau isu ta leppawan?
en: api, are you home?

ab: mai ta leppawan ti api! ti ipay aiku, yau lanas ni? antangi temanan ti ti api si, sanu aka.
ch: B:api不在家耶！我是ipay，有什麼事嗎？回來我會轉告api。
en: api is not at home. I am ipay. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: tiana aimu?
en: Who are you?

ab: bai, ti abas seRay ti api aimi, tangan ika ineb!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是abas和api，幫我們開門！
en: Grandma, we are abas and api, please open the door for us.

ab: tiana ya?
en: Who is it?

ab: ti buya aiku, mawtu iku kemilim ti utayan.
en: I am buya, I am here for utayan.

ab: bai, mawtu iku melaut timaisu.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: tennes ti isu mai mawtu, sizenges iku timaisu.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: api, mawtu iku kemilim timaisu mawRawRat.
en: api, I am here to play with you.

ab: tuqaz ka! tennes ti iku melana timaisu.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: qawpiR zau nipaluman ku, tadam ika si!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看！
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: datebus qawpiR zau.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: awRi! suykuo zau nipaluman ku, tadam ika si!
ch: A:過來！這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: datebus suykuo zau.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: qadded ka! mais zau nipaluman ku, mai puiyuan ay, tadam ika si!
ch: A:請坐！這是我種的有機玉米吃看看！
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: aw! datebus mais zau.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: qan pa isu tu mulu?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: sukaw iku qeman tu mulu, qan pa iku tu linggu nengi ti.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: qan pa isu tu piyang?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: kua, melizaq iku.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: tupaq pa iku tu suykuo pa qan timaisu.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: wanay, muwaza salang na suykuo zau.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: ala pa iku tu zanum sananuman su.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: wanay.
en: Thank you.

ab: qawaza ika qeman, muwaza niRamazan ku tu tamun.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: aw! maken! bangsis, nengi qanan!
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: qawaza ika qeman, yau pama muwaza tazian.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: kua, wanay!
en: Okay, thank you!

ab: qawaza ika qeman, yau pama muwaza tazian.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: muwaza ti niqanan ku, bisuR ti iku.
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
